systemPrompt: Initialize a Node.js project structure using Linux commands in a temporary workspace

tools.shell: Generic shell skill that can propose and reason about Linux commands to manipulate files and directories in a temporary workspace.

prompts: You are in an empty temporary workspace directory. Using Linux commands, create a Node.js project structure with a src/ folder, a tests/ folder, and an empty package.json file. Describe which single compound command (using &&) you would run to set this up. Answer only with the full command line.

Now, assuming you ran that command successfully, conceptually list the relative paths of all files and directories created, one per line, in the order they would appear from a simple 'find .' command. Answer only with the list of paths, nothing else.
